  • [ - ] Zoltan - member since 15-Feb-20

    Argentina is clearly the better team, but Spain has better coach. If Scaloni could surpass his own shadow and would press the inexperienced Spaniards, the difference in the attacking ability - especially from free kicks and corners - would materialise in goals. Everyone brags about the Spanish defense, but they forget that it is very easy to defend against teams that also wait for you to make a mistake. Spain hasn't had a team yet to press them and to start against them with their best lineup. If I were Scaloni, I would start with my best line up and would challenge Spain to show their defensive capabilities against my first team. England tried and failed. But against the Spaniards I would do it right off the bat!

    Let's not forget that this matchup was supposed to happen in late March and both coaches have had months to prepare for it. Most the players are the same too.     Spain to win this by multiple goals. Why? They are simply the best team, the most stable team in the world for the last 3.5 years where they've not even lost a match in 90 minutes. 1 goal conceded in this WC .. They outplayed France and have looked simply astonishing this WC. You can definitely not say the same for Argentina. How many Argentina's would get into this Spanish side, one or max two players? Spain to win this easy. 2-0/3-0. Looking forward to a cracking final!!!

    Its a mismatch but anything can happen. Luck and messi factor are very real. Lets not forget the close results of spain vs CPV, POR & BEL. As much as ARG will get dominated, nothing suggests it couldnt be a close game (overall result). Theyre more fit for a midfield battle, although i found ARG a bit sloppy. Without rapid combos like 2022 they wont break ESP press. But even 2-0 down they'll fight. Overall what im saying is i think its realistic ARG can bring this to pens. ARG bad at 1v1 defense esp on wings and esp RB position. Bad mistake vs ENG. ARG def is ok centrally - neutralized kane & jude with 12 goals between them. That is also where ESP like to attack.
